note: Curated extract of a tui-form-recorder.mjs run (#4880). claude TUI v2.1.168, prompt requesting a 12-option single-select AskUserQuestion. All `in` (keystroke) events are verbatim; selected `out` events are ANSI-stripped and home paths scrubbed. Shows the AskUserQuestion 4-option hard cap (InputValidationError too_big maximum:4). Raw capture not committed.

data: [200~Use your AskUserQuestion tool to ask me ONE single-select questionwith twelve options to choose from (list 12 web frameworks).Don't shorten the list.[201~

text: The AskUserQuestiontool can't do this as asked.Ithard-capseachquestionat4 options(thecallfailedwithtoo_big: maximum 4),andyouexplicitlytoldmenottoshortenthelist—soIwon'tquietlytrim12downto4andpretendthat's what you wanted. A few ways forward:
